title: George, Western Cape — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to George, Western Cape: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

George is a city in Western Cape with a population of 203,000. A picturesque city on the Garden Route, known for its golf courses, forests, and mountain scenery.

Last updated: July 15, 2026
